sub_modules.fp_mult_unpack: Combinational IEEE-754 operand unpacker; extracts sign, effective exponents, 24-bit significands, and zero/infinity/NaN flags.
sub_modules.fp_mult_special: Combinational special-case resolver implementing NaN, infinity, zero, and invalid zero-times-infinity priority rules.
sub_modules.fp_mult_mul_exp: Combinational datapath stage for 24x24 significand multiplication and biased exponent addition.
sub_modules.fp_mult_normalize: Combinational product normalization stage; locates the leading bit, adjusts exponent, and generates significand plus guard/round/sticky bits.
sub_modules.fp_mult_round: Combinational round-to-nearest-even stage with exponent correction and overflow/underflow flag generation.
sub_modules.fp_mult_pack: Combinational IEEE-754 result packer selecting special, overflow, underflow, or normal finite result.
